channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: UK Labour's Andy Burnham Wins Key Election, Mounts Challenge To Keir Starmer

media:content.media:description: The victory cements the status of Burnham as the leading contender to replace Starmer

item.description: Andy Burnham decisively won the seat of Makerfield in northwest England over Rob Kenyon of the anti-immigration party Reform UK.
item.content:encoded: Andy Burnham decisively won the seat of Makerfield in northwest England over Rob Kenyon of the anti-immigration party Reform UK.

item.title: Video: Moment Horse Bolted In New York, Leading To Indian Tourist's Death

media:content.media:description: The horse bolted when the driver got down to take a family picture

item.description: Romanch Mahajan, 18, died as he got off of the four-wheeled carriage to save his mother, who had fallen after the horse sprinted through the park without the driver.
item.content:encoded: Romanch Mahajan, 18, died as he got off of the four-wheeled carriage to save his mother, who had fallen after the horse sprinted through the park without the driver.

item.title: Zohran Mamdani Calls To Ban Horse Carriages In New York After Indian Teen's Death

media:content.media:description: Romanch Mahajan, 18, died after he got off of the four-wheeled carriage

item.description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani backed ending the industry, saying he'd work with all sides to protect workers while phasing out horse-drawn carriages in Central Park.
item.content:encoded: Mayor Zohran Mamdani backed ending the industry, saying he'd work with all sides to protect workers while phasing out horse-drawn carriages in Central Park.

item.title: Trump Flexes Muscle On US-Iran Deal, Says 'No Limits To My Power'

media:content.media:description: Trump said the MoU points to a probable "unconditional surrender" by Iran.

item.description: Trump insisted that the deal showed the deal was not a reflection on his power, but was rather a move to get the oil moving to avoid global depression.
item.content:encoded: Trump insisted that the deal showed the deal was not a reflection on his power, but was rather a move to get the oil moving to avoid global depression.

item.title: Stranger Throws 3-Year-Old Boy Into Zoo Crocodile Pit Before Heroic Rescue In UK

media:content.media:description: The boy was taken to Addenbrooke's Hospital in Cambridge with serious injuries.

item.description: A zoo owner's wife jumped into a crocodile enclosure to try to save a seriously injured three-year-old boy who was allegedly thrown in by a stranger.
item.content:encoded: A zoo owner's wife jumped into a crocodile enclosure to try to save a seriously injured three-year-old boy who was allegedly thrown in by a stranger.

item.title: JD Vance Postpones Switzerland Visit For Iran Talks

media:content.media:description: JD Vance has become administration's face of conflict and has been outspoken in defending deal

item.description: The team led by Vice President JD Vance had been ready to leave but was postponing, the White House said, citing difficult logistics for negotiations.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1115197/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The team led by Vice President JD Vance had been ready to leave but was postponing, the White House said, citing difficult logistics for negotiations.

item.title: "Gets Shocked When Its Monster Bites Back": India Calls Pak "Frankenstein State" At UN

media:content.media:description: Anupama Singh called out Pakistan for callling itself a "victim of terrorism"

item.description: Indian diplomat Anupama Singh also called out Islamabad's "propaganda", referring to "repression" in Pakistan-occupied Jammu and Kashmir.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1115175/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Indian diplomat Anupama Singh also called out Islamabad's "propaganda", referring to "repression" in Pakistan-occupied Jammu and Kashmir.

item.title: Video: 1 Hurt As Shots Fired At New York's Times Square, People Run For Cover

media:content.media:description: Tourists and others nearby were seen scrambling to find cover

item.description: Videos shared on social media captured the moment the shots rang out, prompting people in Times Square to run for safety.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1115177/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Videos shared on social media captured the moment the shots rang out, prompting people in Times Square to run for safety.

item.title: 'Last Ride': US Says Goodbye To Air Force One, Qatari Jet To Join Fleet

media:content.media:description: US Air Force said Qatari jet had completed flight testing and would soon be ready for action

item.description: The goodbye messages fuelled speculation that a Boeing 747 controversially gifted to President Donald Trump by the Gulf emirate of Qatar is now due to enter service.
item.content:encoded: The goodbye messages fuelled speculation that a Boeing 747 controversially gifted to President Donald Trump by the Gulf emirate of Qatar is now due to enter service.

item.title: Democrats Say $350 Million From Trump Tax Bill Funds White House Ballroom

media:content.media:description: The money comes from Donald Trump's big tax breaks

item.description: Apportionment of funds comes from two accounts intended to provide US Secret Service with extra money for training in aftermath of last year's assassination attempts on president, as per Democrats
item.content:encoded: Apportionment of funds comes from two accounts intended to provide US Secret Service with extra money for training in aftermath of last year's assassination attempts on president, as per Democrats

item.title: US-Israel Wedge Deepens: JD Vance Says 'Don't Attack Your Powerful Ally'

media:content.media:description: JD Vance said that Israel is deeply isolated and its leaders have failed to appreciate the Iran deal.

item.description: Israel and the US jointly launched the war against Iran on Feb. 28, closely coordinating the more than month long military operation.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1115159/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Israel and the US jointly launched the war against Iran on Feb. 28, closely coordinating the more than month long military operation.

item.title: "Blunder": Republicans Blast Trump's Iran Agreement

media:content.media:description: Some pro-Republican commentators also broke with Trump over the agreement.

item.description: US President Donald Trump's interim deal to end the Iran war met scorching public criticism from some of his fellow Republicans as copies of the signed agreement circulated on Capitol Hill on Thursday.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump's interim deal to end the Iran war met scorching public criticism from some of his fellow Republicans as copies of the signed agreement circulated on Capitol Hill on Thursday.

item.title: US Faces Tough Path To New Iran Nuclear Deal

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump signed a copy of the US-Iran agreement on June 18.

item.description: After Trump withdrew from that deal in 2018, Iran began rolling back its commitments, with the International Atomic Energy Agency saying Tehran was enriching uranium to 60 percent purity -- far above the previous 3.67 percent cap.
item.content:encoded: After Trump withdrew from that deal in 2018, Iran began rolling back its commitments, with the International Atomic Energy Agency saying Tehran was enriching uranium to 60 percent purity -- far above the previous 3.67 percent cap.

item.title: US-Iran LIVE Updates: US Says It Has Lifted Naval Blockade Of Iranian Ports

media:content.media:description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US and Iran signed the deal digitally.

item.description: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.

item.title: As Iran Deal Kicks In, US Gas Prices Dip Below $4 For 1st Time Since March

media:content.media:description: According to motor club AAA, a gallon of regular gasoline averaged $3.999 on Thursday.

item.description: The average US price for a gallon of gas fell below $4 on Thursday, hitting a level not seen since the first full month of the war with Iran and providing a bit of relief to consumers squeezed by soaring costs.
item.content:encoded: The average US price for a gallon of gas fell below $4 on Thursday, hitting a level not seen since the first full month of the war with Iran and providing a bit of relief to consumers squeezed by soaring costs.

item.title: PM To Release PM-Kisan Installment Tomorrow, Benefiting 9.5 Crore Farmers

media:content.media:description: PM Modi will release the 23rd installment of the PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi from Bengal's Hooghly on Saturday.

item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will release the 23rd installment of the PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi from Tarakeswar in West Bengal's Hooghly district on June 20, marking PM Kisan Utsav Diwas across the country.
item.content:encoded: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will release the 23rd installment of the PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi from Tarakeswar in West Bengal's Hooghly district on June 20, marking PM Kisan Utsav Diwas across the country.

item.title: US Lifts Iran Ports Blockade Ahead Of Swiss Ceremony

media:content.media:description: The US on Thursday lifted a blockade of Iranian ports imposed during the Middle East war.

item.description: The signing of the deal by Trump and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian set in motion a 60-day period for talks on wider issues between the two foes, including the Iranian nuclear programme.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1115156/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The signing of the deal by Trump and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian set in motion a 60-day period for talks on wider issues between the two foes, including the Iranian nuclear programme.

item.title: Crippled By Delays, Pakistan's Ambitious Submarine Programme Gasps For Breath

media:content.media:description: Just one submarine, PNS Hangor, had been inducted into the Pakistan Navy.

item.description: A total of eight Hangor-class submarines were to be acquired under the deal signed by Pakistani and Chinese authorities during Chinese President Xi Jinping's visit to Islamabad in April 2015.
item.content:encoded: A total of eight Hangor-class submarines were to be acquired under the deal signed by Pakistani and Chinese authorities during Chinese President Xi Jinping's visit to Islamabad in April 2015.

item.title: Beyond Teesta: How China's River Projects Could Shape Bangladesh For Decades

media:content.media:description: The Teesta project is just a part of a much broader collaboration between Dhaka and Beijing.

item.description: The project includes major river dredging, construction of embankments, construction of reservoirs, development of an irrigation system, prevention of erosion and the development of a hydrological monitoring system.
item.content:encoded: The project includes major river dredging, construction of embankments, construction of reservoirs, development of an irrigation system, prevention of erosion and the development of a hydrological monitoring system.
